reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch removes the hugetlb_optimize_vmemmap_key static key, which is no longer needed after fake heads were eliminated and detection code removed. The changes are straightforward and correct.

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch removes the hugetlb_optimize_vmemmap_key static key, which was used to guard fake head detection in compound_head() and related functions when HVO (Huge Vmemmap Optimization) was not in use. With fake heads eliminated and the detection code removed, the static key serves no purpose.
